experience.title: Senior Salesforce Developer
description: Designed and developed scalable Salesforce solutions for Sales applications using Apex, LWC, and Flows.
Built and optimized complex Record-Triggered and Screen Flows, improving automation efficiency and reducing manual effort.
Migrated legacy automation (Process Builder & Workflow Rules) to Flow, enhancing performance and maintainability.
Implemented S-Docs document generation solutions to automate business documentation and reporting.
Designed and implemented secure REST API integrations using Named Credentials and OAuth, including error handling mechanisms.
Created custom objects, profiles, and permission sets aligned with business requirements.
Contributed to technical design documentation and solution architecture discussions.
Performed code reviews, ensuring adherence to Salesforce best practices and governor limits.
Supported post-production enhancements, defect resolution, and performance optimization.

Implemented automation using Flows and Apex, reducing manual effort and improving process efficiency.

Participated in solution design, gap analysis, and performance tuning.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver enhancements on time.
Conducted code reviews and knowledge transfer sessions.
Developed and maintained Salesforce integrations with external systems.

Ensured adherence to best practices and scalable design patterns and governor limits.
